tracks.name: DRM_Grid_KickSnare
tracks._note: Industrial kick+snare. The unwavering 4/4 foundation. Lamb of God weight. Sampled real drums — iron weight, not 808 hip-hop.

tracks.name: DRM_Grid_Perc_7_16
tracks._note: 7/16 phasing metallic perc loop. Automate filter cutoff on a 7-bar ramp. Sound Designer: reprogram this rack with a single sharp electronic/metallic hit repeated 7 steps.

tracks.name: DRM_Clock_4_4
tracks._note: Dead-simple quarter-note metallic pulse. Enters INTERROGATION Phase 2. Cold, indifferent, precise.

tracks.name: BASS_Interrogator
tracks._note: Monophonic antagonist bassline. D root + G# tritone. Abrasive, distorted, relentless. Sound Designer: heavy post-distortion, fast plucky filter envelope.

tracks.name: TEX_Witness_Vocal
tracks._note: EMPTY TRACK — REQUIRES MANUAL DEVICE INSERT. Sound Designer must insert Granulator III (M4L) into this track. Load a Gemini TTS spoken word audio source into Granulator III. Automate grain size/position/flux across the 5 arrangement sections: ghost smear (FRAGMENTS) → gated stutter (INTERROGATION P1) → fragmented (INTERROGATION ESC) → dying murmur (SYSTEM FAILURE) → faint echo (ECHO). GranularStretch Kit was removed — it is a Drum Rack and cannot carry granular vocal transformation.

tracks.name: PAD_Prison_Drone
tracks._note: Low grinding environmental drone. Present at start and returns broken in SYSTEM FAILURE. Not glue — the sound of the container fracturing.

tracks.name: PAD_Rising_Dread
tracks._note: Dissonant pad. Enters INTERROGATION Escalation phase (bar 21). 12-bar filter cutoff automation from closed to fully open. Dissonant interval only — no melody. Dark Swell Pad: built to grow — starts cold/harmless at 0% filter, dangerous at 100%. Metal Pad was removed — already abrasive at rest, nowhere to go in the sweep arc.
